reforms.description: The German government is proposing new legislation to enhance the attractiveness of private investment in housing, aiming to meet future housing demands.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing private investment is expected to stimulate economic activity and address housing demands.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been proposed but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant but not a structural overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The Government will propose new legislation designed to enhance the attractiveness of private investment in housing.

reforms.description: The Federal Government is working to accelerate licensing procedures for nuclear power plants while maintaining safety standards, which is expected to facilitate energy sector investments.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Accelerating licensing procedures is likely to enhance investment in the energy sector, promoting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform is in the planning stages and has not yet been implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant for the energy sector but not a comprehensive overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The Federal Government is making strong efforts to accelerate licensing procedures for nuclear power plants without reducing safety standards or rights protected by law.
